narrative:
Lithopolis Village B (precinct in Fairfield County) has 709 registered voters, with 50.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.8 percentage points.
